title: check:all standard adoption keeps mulch gate bodies, swaps orchestration
rationale: Adopted the fleet check:all standard (pl-237d): scripts/check-all.ts + check-ci-parity.ts are byte-identical copies from templates/l5-toolkit (verify with cmp, never edit in place). Gate NAMES are frozen; mulch-specific flags stay in package.json bodies (check:deps keeps --include-entry-exports). CI escape hatches live in scripts/ci-parity-config.json: test:ci aliases to check:coverage (junit/lcov reporters for artifacts), report:timing/report:quality are ciOnly. lint+typecheck joined the manifest; redundant standalone CI steps were dropped.
